node.title: Uber SWE II Coding 2: Machine Coding or LeetCode?

article.title: Uber SWE II Coding 2: Machine Coding or LeetCode?
article.content:
I have an upcoming Uber onsite round called:

"Depth in Specialization (Coding 2)"

The preparation guide mentions:

- day-to-day backend coding problems
- implementing something from scratch
- modifying an existing project/codebase
- discussing how to take the solution into production

For those who have completed this round, was it closer to:

1. LeetCode-style algorithm questions
2. Machine coding / backend component implementation
3. Modifying an existing codebase
4. A mix of the above

I'm trying to understand how to balance my preparation between algorithms and backend machine coding.

post.content: its in most cases LLD. It can be DSA design questions as well similar to https://leetcode.com/problem-list/design/ . it can vary on luck too. For me, I was asked a pure DSA question only but my friend was asked pure LLD problem. Anyhow just prepare DSA and LLD well and can practice some questions from https://leetcode.com/problem-list/design/ too. You will be good to go unless your luck is bad.
Can we please connect? I am no a similar boat.
